Notice Of Unopposed Motion For Attorney Fees, Litigation Costs And Service Award And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar May-14-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RICHARD CRESSE's, ON BEHALF OF HIMSELF AND ALL OTHER SIMILARLY SITUATED, Unopposed Motion For Attorney Fees, Litigation Costs And Service Award.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. The court is inclined to sign the proposed order lodged with the moving papers but orders plaintiff's counsel to provide a Word version of the order that has Westlaw rather than Lexis citations.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
